live.heading: Agent connection
live.waiting: Waiting for the agent to connect…

empty.title: No enrollment tokens
empty.description: Generate a token to onboard a new Panvex agent. Each token is single-use and expires after its TTL.
empty.filterDescription: Widen the filter or clear the search.
empty.listDescription: No active tokens match the current filter.

subtitle.step1: Pick a node name; we'll mint a one-shot token.
subtitle.step2: Run this command on the target Linux server as root.
subtitle.step3: Waiting for the agent to come online.

mode.label: Transport mode
mode.inboundHint: Agent dials the panel. Use when the panel is internet-reachable from the agent host.
mode.outboundHint: Panel dials the agent on its public host:port. Use when the panel is firewalled (private network / VPN).

fleetGroup.label: Fleet group
fleetGroup.hint: Leave empty to add the node without a group — it'll land in the default scope.

dialAddress.label: Agent dial address
dialAddress.required: Dial address is required for outbound mode.
dialAddress.invalid: Dial address must be host:port (e.g. vps.example.com:8443).
dialAddress.hint: The panel dials this from its egress to reach the agent. The agent will listen on the matching port locally.

ttl.label: Token lifetime
ttl.invalid: Token lifetime must be greater than zero.

scriptSource.label: Install-script source
scriptSource.githubHint: Curl pulls install-agent.sh from raw.githubusercontent.com. Default for outbound (panel may be firewalled from the agent).

insecure.aria: Allow plaintext on public-IP / hostname panel
insecure.title: Allow plaintext on public-IP / hostname panel
insecure.description: Passes <0>--insecure-transport</0> so the agent accepts an http:// panel URL on a public IP or a hostname. Private IPs (10/8, 172.16/12, 192.168/16, CGNAT, IPv6 ULA) are auto-trusted without this flag. Bootstrap exchanges the agent private key in cleartext — only tick on a trusted link.

telemtNote.label: Note:
telemtNote.text: Telemt (mtproto-proxy) must already be running on the target server.

requirements.metrics: Enable Telemt metrics export (disabled by default)

metricsEmpty.title: Metrics empty after connect
metricsEmpty.bodyBefore: Telemt ships with metrics off. Enable the metrics exporter in your Telemt config and confirm

tokenExpired.title: Token expired
tokenExpired.body: Go back and generate a new token. Tokens are single-use and time-limited.

connect.online: is online. Redirecting to the server page…
